# Recorded IMAP IDLE session (annotated transcript).
# Live protocol behavior is exercised offline by imapsync_test.go via the
# in-memory imapserver; this transcript documents the wire sequence the
# IDLE loop in internal/mail/imapsync/idle.go implements.
S: * OK [CAPABILITY IMAP4rev1 IDLE] IMAP server ready
C: A1 LOGIN user@example.com <redacted>
S: A1 OK LOGIN completed
C: A2 LIST "" "*"
S: * LIST (\HasNoChildren) "/" INBOX
S: A2 OK LIST completed
C: A3 SELECT INBOX
S: * 2 EXISTS
S: * OK [UIDVALIDITY 1717600000] UIDs valid
S: A3 OK [READ-WRITE] SELECT completed
C: A4 UID FETCH 1:* (UID ENVELOPE FLAGS RFC822.SIZE)
S: * 1 FETCH (UID 101 ...)
S: * 2 FETCH (UID 102 ...)
S: A4 OK FETCH completed
C: A5 IDLE
S: + idling
# ... 29-minute keepalive window; server push on new mail:
S: * 3 EXISTS
C: DONE
S: A5 OK IDLE terminated
C: A6 UID FETCH 103:* (UID ENVELOPE FLAGS RFC822.SIZE)
S: * 3 FETCH (UID 103 ...)
S: A6 OK FETCH completed
C: A7 IDLE
S: + idling
